```{r}
  mutate(Genotype = str_extract(Sample, "^(ECAH|ECG|ORAPG)"))
abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Treatment = case_when(
    str_detect(Sample, "(1|2|3)$") ~ "Control",
    str_detect(Sample, "(4|5|6)$") ~ "Heat",
    TRUE                           ~ NA_character_
  ))

```

```{r}
# #apply lm anova
abundance_data_acuta_bacte <- lm(Bacte_Percentage~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype, data = abundance_data_acuta)
# Perform ANOVA on results
anova(abundance_data_acuta_bacte)
#Analysis of Variance Table
#Response: Proteo_Percentage
#Response: Bacte_Percentage
#                     Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
#Treatment             1 1358.8  1358.8  5.9971 0.030655 * 
#Algae_type            1  282.1   282.1  1.2449 0.286379   
#Genotype              1 3288.3  3288.3 14.5128 0.002486 **
#Treatment:Algae_type  1  415.8   415.8  1.8353 0.200458   
#Treatment:Genotype    1  386.2   386.2  1.7043 0.216200   
#Residuals            12 2718.9   226.6                    
#---
#Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

kruskal.test(Bacte_Percentage ~ Algae_type, data = abundance_data_acuta)
```
```{r}
library(emmeans)

#Get estimated marginal means
emm_b <- emmeans(abundance_data_acuta_bacte,
               ~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype)

# Pairwise contrasts across one factor (e.g. Treatment),
#     holding the others at their combinations:
pairs(emm_b, by = c("Algae_type","Genotype"), adjust = "tukey")

#Algae_type = Cladocopium, Genotype = ECAH:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat     3.78 12.3 12   0.308  0.9494

#Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ECG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat    12.83 12.3 12   1.044  0.5649

#Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ORAPG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat    35.52 12.3 12   2.890  0.0337

```

```{r}
# Calculate the total abundance and Gammaproteobacteria abundance for df_aip
gamma_abundance_acuta <- aggregate(Abundance ~ Sample, data = df_acuta[df_acuta$Class == "Gammaproteobacteria", ], FUN = sum)

# Merge and calculate the percentage for Gammaproteobacteria
abundance_data_acuta <- merge(total_abundance_acuta, gamma_abundance_acuta, by = "Sample", suffixes = c(".Total", ".Gamma"))
abundance_data_acuta$Gamma_Percentage <- (abundance_data_acuta$Abundance.Gamma / abundance_data_acuta$Abundance.Total) * 100

# Replace NA with 0 if there are samples with no Gammaproteobacteria
abundance_data_acuta$Gamma_Percentage[is.na(abundance_data_acuta$Gamma_Percentage)] <- 0
```

```{r}
# Add columns to the matすにさTreatment,Genotype, Algae_type column to 

abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Algae_type = ifelse(grepl("^ECAH", Sample), "Cladocopium",
                        ifelse(grepl("^(ECG|ORAPG)", Sample), "Durusdinium", NA)))



abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Genotype = str_extract(Sample, "^(ECAH|ECG|ORAPG)"))
abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Treatment = case_when(
    str_detect(Sample, "(1|2|3)$") ~ "Control",
    str_detect(Sample, "(4|5|6)$") ~ "Heat",
    TRUE                           ~ NA_character_
  ))

```

```{r}

   
colvec <- c("Control" = "gray40", "Heat" = "coral1")
shapes = c("ECAH" = 21, "ECG" = 22, "ORAPG"=24)
acuta_bacte<-ggplot(abundance_data_acuta, aes(x = Treatment, y = Bacte_Percentage, fill = Treatment, group = Treatment, shape=Genotype)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colvec) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shapes)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colvec) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Treatment), size = 2.5, width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(x = "Treatment", y = "Percentage of Bacteroidia") +  # Corrected to use 'labs' for both labels
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(-1, 75)+facet_wrap(~Genotype)  # Set y-axis limits from 1 to 100
acuta_bacte

```


```{r}
# #apply lm anova
abundance_data_acuta_gamma<- lm(Gamma_Percentage~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype, data = abundance_data_acuta)
# Perform ANOVA on results
anova(abundance_data_acuta_gamma)
#Analysis of Variance Table
#Response: Proteo_Percentage
#Response: Bacte_Percentage
#Response: Gamma_Percentage
#                     Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value  Pr(>F)  
#Treatment             1   40.90   40.90  0.2616 0.61830  
#Algae_type            1  283.07  283.07  1.8108 0.20329  
#Genotype              1  687.60  687.60  4.3986 0.05782 .
#Treatment:Algae_type  1   32.63   32.63  0.2088 0.65591  
#Treatment:Genotype    1  193.46  193.46  1.2376 0.28773  
#Residuals            12 1875.88  156.32                  
#---
#Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

kruskal.test(Bacte_Percentage ~ Algae_type, data = abundance_data_acuta)
```

```{r}
library(emmeans)

#Get estimated marginal means
emm_g <- emmeans(abundance_data_acuta_gamma,
               ~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype)

# Pairwise contrasts across one factor (e.g. Treatment),
#     holding the others at their combinations:
pairs(emm_g, by = c("Algae_type","Genotype"), adjust = "tukey")

#Algae_type = Cladocopium, Genotype = ECAH:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat     6.82 10.2 12   0.668  0.7858

#Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ECG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat     9.14 10.2 12   0.895  0.6533

#Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ORAPG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat    -6.92 10.2 12  -0.678  0.7805
```



```{r}
acuta_gamma<-ggplot(abundance_data_acuta, aes(x = Treatment, y = Gamma_Percentage, fill = Treatment, group = Treatment, shape=Genotype)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colvec) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shapes)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colvec) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Treatment), size = 2.5, width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(x = "Treatment", y = "Percentage of Gammaproteobacteria") +  # Corrected to use 'labs' for both labels
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(-1, 55)+facet_wrap(~Genotype)  # Set y-axis limits from 1 to 100
acuta_gamma
```

```{r}
# Calculate the total abundance and Alphaproteobacteria abundance for df_aip
alpha_abundance_acuta <- aggregate(Abundance ~ Sample, data = df_acuta[df_acuta$Class == "Alphaproteobacteria", ], FUN = sum)

# Merge and calculate the percentage for Alphaproteobacteria
abundance_data_acuta <- merge(total_abundance_acuta, alpha_abundance_acuta, by = "Sample", suffixes = c(".Total", ".Alpha"))
abundance_data_acuta$Alpha_Percentage <- (abundance_data_acuta$Abundance.Alpha / abundance_data_acuta$Abundance.Total) * 100

# Replace NA with 0 if there are samples with no Alphaproteobacteria
abundance_data_acuta$Alpha_Percentage[is.na(abundance_data_acuta$Alpha_Percentage)] <- 0
```

```{r}

# Add columns to the matすにさTreatment,Genotype, Algae_type column to 

abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Algae_type = ifelse(grepl("^ECAH", Sample), "Cladocopium",
                        ifelse(grepl("^(ECG|ORAPG)", Sample), "Durusdinium", NA)))


abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Genotype = str_extract(Sample, "^(ECAH|ECG|ORAPG)"))
abundance_data_acuta <- abundance_data_acuta %>%
  mutate(Treatment = case_when(
    str_detect(Sample, "(1|2|3)$") ~ "Control",
    str_detect(Sample, "(4|5|6)$") ~ "Heat",
    TRUE                           ~ NA_character_
  ))

```



```{r}
# #apply lm anova
abundance_data_acuta_alpha<- lm(Alpha_Percentage~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype, data = abundance_data_acuta)
# Perform ANOVA on results
anova(abundance_data_acuta_alpha)
#Response: Alpha_Percentage
#                    Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
#Treatment             1   0.99    0.99  0.1991 0.6633906    
#Algae_type            1   3.53    3.53  0.7101 0.4158899    
##Genotype              1 434.27  434.27 87.3371 7.405e-07 ***
#Treatment:Algae_type  1 153.60  153.60 30.8915 0.0001242 ***
#Treatment:Genotype    1 229.69  229.69 46.1931 1.912e-05 ***
#Residuals            12  59.67    4.97                      
```

```{r}
#Get estimated marginal means
emm_a <- emmeans(abundance_data_acuta_alpha,
               ~ Treatment*Algae_type*Genotype)

# Pairwise contrasts across one factor (e.g. Treatment),
#     holding the others at their combinations:
pairs(emm_a, by = c("Algae_type","Genotype"), adjust = "tukey")

#Algae_type = Cladocopium, Genotype = ECAH:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat     7.79 1.82 12   4.280  0.0028

##Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ECG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat     4.15 1.82 12   2.279  0.0977

#Algae_type = Durusdinium, Genotype = ORAPG:
# contrast       estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
# Control - Heat   -13.35 1.82 12  -7.333  <.0001
#Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1
```


```{r}
colvec <- c("Control" = "gray40", "Heat" = "coral1")
shapes = c("ECAH" = 21, "ECG" = 22, "ORAPG"=24)
acuta_alpha<-ggplot(abundance_data_acuta, aes(x = Treatment, y = Alpha_Percentage, fill = Treatment, group = Treatment, shape=Genotype)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colvec) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shapes)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colvec) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Treatment), size = 2.5, width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(x = "Treatment", y = "Percentage of Bacteroidia") +  # Corrected to use 'labs' for both labels
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(-1, 21)+facet_wrap(~Genotype)  # Set y-axis limits from 1 to 100
acuta_alpha
```

```{r}
library(gridExtra)
# Display plots side by side
combine<-grid.arrange(acuta_bacte, acuta_gamma,acuta_alpha, nrow = 1)
ggsave(combine, filename = "Percen_Class.pdf", width=10, height=2.5, units=c("in"), useDingbats=FALSE)

```
